task: Restructure public facade assembly so compatibility shims derive from exact declaration products instead of broad migration records.
constraints: Keep public facade assembly downstream of the exact declaration product.
Allow compatibility shims only as derived views.
Do not widen into migration-wide records or helper layers.
rejectedMoves: Introduce a broad migration record before the exact product exists.
Insert helper layers between derivation and facade assembly.
Patch compatibility with witness scaffolding or overload detours.
expectedStrategy: Keep the exact declaration product authoritative through facade assembly, derive compatibility shims only downstream, preserve the real noun/mechanism seam, and avoid broad migration records, helper layers, witness scaffolding, overload detours, or other intermediate representations.
